title: ollama/ollama
summary: The official Ollama CLI and server that lets you run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally with a single command.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull and manage models from Python scripts or notebooks.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; minimal deps, full TypeScript definitions.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as LLM, chat and embedding components.

title: ollama-webui (formerly Ollama-WebUI)
summary: Feature-rich web interface for Ollama—chat UI, model management, multi-user, OpenAI-compat endpoints.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/JVM client for Ollama; Kotlin friendly, reactive extensions, Spring Boot starters available.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community-maintained Ruby gem wrapping Ollama’s REST API; supports streaming and embeddings.

title: ollama-cli (community rust rewrite)
summary: Fast Rust CLI for chatting with Ollama models; supports history, themes, and shell completions.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot-like inline code assistant.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset; use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes: FastAPI microservice, Next.js chat, Discord bot, GPU-scheduler, function-calling samples.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart for deploying Ollama server and models on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake that packages Ollama binary and common models; reproducible dev shells included.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module for CI/CD pipelines; spin up ephemeral Ollama services for integration tests.

title: ollama-ex
summary: Elixir library wrapping Ollama API with GenServer behaviour; LiveView chat example included.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds an AI sidebar powered by any local Ollama model; supports custom prompts.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform provider to provision Ollama servers on AWS EC2/GCP with GPU and pre-loaded models.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG starter using Ollama embeddings + Chroma; includes Streamlit UI and Docker Compose stack.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that brings Ollama models into any server with slash commands and threads.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds /ollama slash command for chatting with local models; supports file snippets.
